title: Catapple Retexture
description: gives all apples silly cat face, 1.20 - 26.2
body:
- changes apple, golden apple and enchanted golden apple texture to be silly cats
- renames all apples to 'catapples'
- no mods/ additional downloads needed
- compatible with Theone's Eating Animation pack

- also available to download on curseforge (or for feedback/ issues): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/catapple-retexture

(ty for all of the downloads <333)
